summary.en: HORDI recommendation for cabbage (Brassica oleracea Capitata) in cool upland regions. Variety: Green Coronet. Spacing 40 × 50 cm; three-stage fertilizer schedule; 90–110 days to harvest; yield 40–45 t/ha. Heat-tolerant varieties can be grown in dry zone.
summary.si: සිසිල් උඩරට ප්‍රදේශ සඳහා HORDI ගෝවා (Brassica oleracea Capitata) වගා නිර්දේශය. ප්‍රභේදය: Green Coronet. පරතරය 40 × 50 cm; තුන් අදියර පොහොර වැඩසටහන; අස්වනු දින 90-110; අස්වැන්න ටොන් 40-45/හෙ. වියළි කලාපයේ තාපය ඉවසන ප්‍රභේද වගා කළ හැකිය.
summary.ta: குளிர்ந்த மலைநாட்டு பகுதிகளில் முட்டைக்கோஸ் (Brassica oleracea Capitata) பயிரிடுவதற்கான HORDI பரிந்துரை. வகை: Green Coronet. இடைவெளி 40 × 50 cm; மூன்று கட்ட உர அட்டவணை; அறுவடைக்கு 90-110 நாட்கள்; மகசூல் 40-45 டன்/ஹெக்டேர். வெப்பம் தாங்கும் வகைகளை வறண்ட வலயத்தில் பயிரிடலாம்.

field_provenance.notes: Heat-tolerant varieties (noted on source) can extend the AEZ list into the dry zone — add DL codes once specific heat-tolerant cultivars are captured as crop_variety rows.

body.en: Well-drained loamy soil with pH 6.0–6.5 and adequate organic matter.
Transplant seedlings at 40 × 50 cm spacing. Seed requirement 200–250 g/ha.
Harvest 90–110 days after planting when heads are firm.

notes.en: Diamondback moth (Plutella xylostella). Spray Emamectin benzoate 5% SG 8 g/16 L, or Chlorantraniliprole 200 g/L SC 6 ml/16 L.
Cabbage looper (Trichoplusia ni). Spray Spinosad 25 g/L SC 16 ml/16 L, or Tebufenozide 200 g/L SC 24 ml/16 L.
Black cutworm. Spray Profenophos 500 g/L EC 32 ml/16 L, or Etofenprox 100 g/L EC 24 ml/16 L.
Aphids. Spray Thiamethoxam 25% WG 5 g/16 L, or Imidacloprid 70% WG 2 g/16 L.
Club root (Plasmodiophora brassicae). Apply lime to raise soil pH, practice 3-year rotation with non-brassicas, and plant disease-free seedlings.
Cercospora leaf spot. Rotate fungicides: Maneb / Mancozeb / Propineb / Tebuconazole.
Downy mildew. Captan / Maneb / Mancozeb per DOA 2019 pesticide recommendation.
